title: 日本ダービーの後に・魅力を伝える舞台

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming to see me, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Did you have a good time?
Did you have a good time?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Thanks for coming to see me, Trainer!
choice_data_list: Did you have a good time?
Did you have a good time?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text: Well, duh! Hehe! It's the Derby—how could I not have fun?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Flying down the final stretch through all those
cheers from the crowd... I wish I could do it again
and again and again!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
It was such a satisfying run. I think everyone could
feel it! ♪

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Now that the second race of the Classic Triple
Crown is over, the Kikuka Sho should be next on
the docket, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It makes a lot of sense to go for the third race of
the crown. The Kikuka Sho isn't a bad idea.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
However, the place where Maruzensky's
performance will truly shine will be at the end of
the year...
choice_data_list: Our goal is the Arima Kinen!
Our goal is the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
You're saying that, with all the seniors there, it'd
be the perfect race to show off my speed, right?

text_block_list.name: Maruzensky
text_block_list.text:
Well, count me in! It sounds like a blast! Let's
shoot for the big one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With our sights now set on the Arima Kinen, the
curtain closes on the Japanese Derby.

text_block_list.name: Umamusume Classmate
text_block_list.text: Yes, it makes me want to keep running...
